centrality-006.user_notes:
Betweenness Centrality identifies nodes that act as bridges by lying on many shortest paths between other nodes.

Quick Notes on All Options

  • Degree Centrality Measures how many direct connections a node has; indicates popularity but not its role in connecting distant parts of the network.
  • Closeness Centrality Measures how close a node is to all others based on shortest paths; high values mean fast reachability across the network.
  • Betweenness Centrality ✅ Captures how often a node lies on shortest paths between other nodes, identifying bridge or broker nodes.
  • PageRank Centrality Measures a node’s importance based on incoming links weighted by the importance of the linking nodes; originally used by Google for ranking web pages.

    A["Node A (High Degree)"]

    D["Node D (High PageRank)"]
    E["Node E"]

    A --> B
    A --> C
    B --> C
    B --> D
    E --> D
    C --> D

Nvidia-Perplexity-Deep-Research-9.user_notes: The ring all-reduce algorithm is highly efficient for synchronizing weights across distributed devices. It organizes devices in a ring topology, allowing gradients to be aggregated and distributed with minimal communication overhead. This is superior to master-worker approaches (which create bottlenecks), sequential epoch-end synchronization (which is inefficient), and keeping weights independent (which violates data parallelism principles).
